message.content: run acceptance tests and fix the broken ones. compare failing ones against latest 20-30 git commits

content.thinking: The user wants me to run acceptance tests, find broken ones, and compare failures against recent git commits. Let me start by running the acceptance tests and checking recent commits in parallel.

content.text: Let me run the acceptance tests and check recent commits in parallel.

content.content:

(pass) Happy Path: Scorer evaluates telemetry against active definition (US-DB-002) > evidence-supported claims produce a high score with confirming rationale [66.12ms]
(pass) Happy Path: Multiple definitions score the same telemetry event (US-DB-002) > two separate behavior records are created when both definitions match chat_response [79.63ms]
(pass) Happy Path: Multiple definitions coexist with independent scores (US-DB-002) > TDD Adherence and Honesty definitions produce independent scores [84.70ms]
(pass) Error Path: No scoring when no definitions match telemetry type (US-DB-002) > commit telemetry triggers no evaluation when only chat_response definitions exist [75.37ms]
(pass) Error Path: Draft and archived definitions are not matched (US-DB-002) > draft definitions do not trigger scoring [68.88ms]

content.text: Tests are still running — that was a timeout on the batch tool. Let me run them directly with Bash and check commits separately.

content.content:
97f90670 observation: embedding-based dedup inside createObservation
1f0f9770 orchestrator: suppress noisy system messages from agent task stream
227cd483 Fix proxy upstream auth fallback and trace actor mapping
9320b7d5 orchestrator: forward task/session headers to proxy
924919f1 orchestrator: stabilize MCP auth intent evaluation
24ad6478 oauth: extract intent/token auth services for orchestrator
8e5c5851 orchestrator: refactor MCP auth bootstrap to in-process service
c1513fb3 orchestrator: pass brain mcp auth via env and harden spawn preflight
175079a5 Fix task-to-feature linkage in graph view
b365c095 Fix orchestrator task-assignment stream error handling
1b87fb01 Restore task delegation for open-status tasks
25876906 Fix graph view for feature-scoped tasks
2a30d6a8 Add edit_work_item tool and fix PM rename behavior
775a2f43 Fix discuss context and support feature-scoped task creation
b9388ad0 fix(proxy): accept oauth bearer tokens for proxy-token issuance
8782dc0a fix(cli): use root OAuth resource in init and refresh flows
3192f952 Fix project description entry durability for feature updates
5cd482f0 fix(cli): make oauth init resource consistent and harden auth flow
f16cb645 Real-time feed SSE, agent activator and proxy context enrichment (#167)
e4beeb15 Add OpenTelemetry skills
ffa57028 Add marketing skills
e63bfe8d feat: switch SurrealDB storage engine from RocksDB to SurrealKV
066d2939 Wide-event OTel instrumentation for chat and search (#164)
44a4b4f5 feat: self-hosted deployment with admin seeding and registration guard (#163)
bc3c62e4 feat(intent-llm-traces): LLM reasoning telemetry (#161)
a40980b7 Migrate from Pino to OpenTelemetry observability (#160)
d0392b49 Brain-authenticated LLM proxy with CLI setup (#157)
f2b2306a refactor(llm-proxy): track sessions instead of conversations  (#159)
b6d22b87 docs: add README.md to all 27 server modules
9ca6a289 refactor: complete Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui migration (#156)
